button.name: action_fetch
button.placeholder: Performs the mapping of the fields from the Chart of Accounts
button.confirm: Performing this action will reset all the Detailed Profit & Loss values if they are already fetched. Please continue to proceed if you still want to make this happen.

button.name: action_fetch
button.placeholder: Performs the mapping of the fields from the Chart of Accounts
button.confirm: Performing this action will reset all the Detailed Profit & Loss values if they are already fetched. Please continue to proceed if you still want to make this happen.

div.span: The company maintains Singapore dollar as its functional/ presentation currency.
The company is not an investment holding company or a service company that provides only related party services.
The company does not own subsidiaries, associates or joint ventures, and has no investment in intangibles.

span.b: Gains/ Losses from the Sale or Disposal of Foreign Assets - Section 10L
Innovation Projects Carried Out with Partner Institutions
Qualifying Research and Development (R&D) Undertaken in Singapore

separator.string: Other Property, Plant and Equipment (Non-HP)(Low Value Assets)

label.string: Please review the following Detailed Profit & Loss, Tax Computation & Other Schedules

tr.td: Commission (Other than Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income)
Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Commission

Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Interest

Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Repair and maintenance

Insurance (other than medical expenses and expenses incurred to derive Rental Income)
Interest expenses (other than expenses incurred to derive rental Income)
Impairment loss/ reversal of impairment loss for bad debts
Net Gains/ Losses on disposal of property, plant and equipment
Net Gains/ Losses on foreign exchange adjustment
Net Gains/ Losses on Other Items
Property tax (other than expenses incurred to derive rental income)
Repairs and Maintenance (excluding private motor vehicles and expenses incurred to derive rental income)
Skills Development Levy/ Foreign Worker Levy
Upkeep Of Private Motor Vehicles - Private

Expenses incurred to derive rental income - Property tax
Expenses incurred to derive rental income - Repair and maintenance

Net Gains/ Losses on Other Items
Adjusted Profit/ Loss before Other deductions

Enhanced Deductions under Enterprise Innovation Scheme (EIS)
for Training; Innovation Projects carried out with Partner Institutions; Licensing of Intellectual Property Rights; Registration of Intellectual Property; Qualfiying R&D undertaken in Singapore
Adjusted profit/ Loss before capital allowances
Adjusted Profit/ loss after capital allowance and unutilised losses brought forward
Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Commission
Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Insurance
Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Interest
Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Property tax
Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Repair and maintenance
Expenses incurred to derive Rental Income - Others

page.p: The leasehold improvements and renovation cost do not require the approval of the Commissioner of Building Control under the Building Control Act
